title: Add unit/integration tests for empty log initialization
summary: Add tests that verify initialization succeeds when tx_event_log.jsonl is empty and that baseline state is derived consistently.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover empty tx_event_log.jsonl initialization behavior.
Tests validate baseline tx_state derivation without manual tx_event input.
Tests confirm tool input handling works in init scenarios.

steps.description: Identify test locations for initialization and tx_event_log handling.
Add unit tests for empty log initialization and baseline state derivation.
Add integration tests for init flows involving tx_event_append/tx_state_save.

notes: Keep tests focused on initialization behavior.
Align assertions with expected tool input requirements.
